description: Initial benchmark dataset. Replace questions/answers with ones specific to your uploaded documents.

questions.question: What is the main topic of the document?
questions.reference_answer: The document covers [REPLACE WITH YOUR DOCUMENT TOPIC].

questions.question: What are the key findings or conclusions?
questions.reference_answer: The key findings are [REPLACE WITH ACTUAL FINDINGS].

questions.question: Who is the intended audience for this document?

notes: This is a template benchmark. Populate with 30–100 real questions after uploading your documents. Cover: exact keyword queries, paraphrased semantic queries, multi-part questions, section-specific lookups.
